title: work-at Dashboard App Quick Tunnel Surface
description: Fast health profile for the worker-hosted dashboard-app quick-tunnel surface.

checks.title: work-at target is reachable
checks.repairHint: Restore worker connectivity or re-register the dashboard-app target before attempting a quick tunnel.

checks.title: dashboard-app path exists
checks.repairHint: Restore or re-register the dashboard-app path on the worker before attempting a quick tunnel.

checks.title: Bun is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Bun on the worker before running the dashboard app dev server.

checks.title: cloudflared is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install or expose `cloudflared` on the worker before attempting a quick tunnel. Do not fall back to localhost.run for this workflow.

checks.title: dashboard-app package.json exists on target
checks.repairHint: Restore `package.json` in the dashboard-app surface before starting a quick tunnel workflow.

checks.title: dashboard-app vite config exists on target
checks.repairHint: Restore `vite.config.ts` in the dashboard-app surface before starting a worker quick tunnel workflow.

checks.title: dashboard-app local dev frontend is reachable
checks.repairHint: Start the dashboard-app dev server on the worker and verify it responds locally before attempting a quick tunnel.

checks.title: cloudflared quick tunnel is active for the dev frontend
checks.repairHint: Run a worker-local `cloudflared tunnel --url http://127.0.0.1:5173 --no-autoupdate` for this surface. Do not use localhost.run for this workflow.

checks.title: quick tunnel session generator returns a healthy dev URL
checks.repairHint: Repair the worker dev backend or the quick-tunnel session generator so a fresh quick tunnel URL can be issued and its health endpoint succeeds before handing a URL to the user.
